title: Prediction of platinum-based neoadjuvant chemotherapy response in muscle-invasive bladder cancer using a multifaceted approach
author: Askari, Arian
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Dataset  
 This dataset contains gene-level RNA sequencing count matrices and associated metadata generated from bladder cancer samples analyzed in two experimental phases. The data were produced to investigate transcriptional differences in tumor samples collected during transurethral resection of bladder tumor (TUR-BT) procedures. 
  Data Contents  
 The repository includes: 
 
 
 Gene-level count matrix for whole-transcriptome RNA sequencing samples (paired-end sequencing, Discovery phase-1) 
 
 
 Gene-level count matrix for targeted RNA expression sequencing samples (single-end sequencing, Validation phase-2) 
 
 
 Sample metadata describing sample identifiers and experimental groups 
 
 
 All count matrices contain  raw read counts  and have not been normalized. 
  Reference Genome and Annotation  
 Human reference genome:  GRCh38 primary assembly  Gene annotation:  GENCODE release v48  
  Software  
 
 
 R v.4.4.0 
 
 
 Bioconductor package  Rsubread (v2.18.0)  
 
 
 featureCounts (Rsubread)
